raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a necessary precondition for achieving intelligent accomplishment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Thought alone is insufficient for intelligent accomplishment without being joined to purpose",
    "Purpose is a distinct, addable element that can be deliberately linked to thought",
    "Intelligent accomplishment is a recognizable category of outcome that depends on this linkage",
    "Unpurposed thought produces no intelligent results"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a motivational axiom but relies on undefined terms (thought, purpose, intelligent accomplishment), rendering it tautological if purpose is simply defined as whatever produces accomplishment",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The reader accepts a model of agency in which deliberate alignment of cognition with goals measurably improves outcomes and seeks practical guidance for directing mental effort",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Purpose is treated as an intrinsic property rather than a constructed one, spontaneous or emergent achievements are dismissed, or the statement is used to justify inaction until a grand purpose is identified"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Asserting a necessary precondition for achieving intelligent accomplishment
implicit_claims: Thought alone is insufficient for intelligent accomplishment without being joined to purpose
Purpose is a distinct, addable element that can be deliberately linked to thought
Intelligent accomplishment is a recognizable category of outcome that depends on this linkage
